title: Tall Tales of Bronwic
subtitle: A Post-Apocalyptic LitRPG Adventure
blurb: Bronwic just wanted to retire in peace, but the Mana Influx tore the world apart and rewrote the rules of survival. From the ruins of the Pacific Northwest to dungeons seeded with alien logic, Bronwic embraces a progression path that pushes him beyond human limits. Tall Tales of Bronwic launches an epic LitRPG saga filled with crunchy stat progression, irreverent humor, and desperate fights to keep humanity alive.
